CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY SBMA LTD CAL LTD PARTNERSHIP THE ORIGINAL PROPERTY MANAGER MASADA DEVELOPMENT AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HALLMARK KIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALLMARK KIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SBMA LTD CAL LTD PARTNERSHIP THE ORIGINAL PROPERTY MANAGER MASADA DEVELOPMENT NO APPEARANCE BY PLTF/CROSS DEFT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HALLMARK KIM TO BRING ACTION OF SBMT & THE ORIGINAL PROPERTY MGR IN MUNICIPAL COURT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND. RETURNED, UNDELIVERABLE.
